description_en: A monument, a stone monument of the Kenmu era at Kammachi. Municipally designated by Nikaho City as a historic site on 1988-03-10. Located at Kammachi, Hirasawa, Nikaho City, Akita Prefecture.

description_en: A tangible cultural property (building), the shrine hall and ridgepole plaques (munafuda) of Hachiman Shrine. Municipally designated by Noshiro City on 2004-02-26. Located at Kami-Motai, Motai.
